mapper.select: SELECT partner_id AS partnerId, partner_name AS partnerName, partner_logo_url AS partnerLogoUrl, partner_address AS partnerAddress, partner_phone AS partnerPhone, description AS description FROM partners WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY partner_id DESC

SELECT partner_id AS partnerId, partner_name AS partnerName, partner_logo_url AS partnerLogoUrl, partner_address AS partnerAddress, partner_phone AS partnerPhone, description AS description FROM partners WHERE partner_id = #{partnerId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
